scenarios.description: parse(File, null charsetName, baseUri, parser) uses Parser overload with null charset branch
scenarios.precondition: existing HTML file created on disk
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned with baseUri and parsed by provided parser
pseudocode: TEST TC21 parse file with parser and null charset
File f = create temp .xml file with '<root><x/></root>'
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(f, null, baseUri, xmlParser);

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream, null charsetName, baseUri, parser) uses InputStream parser overload with null charset branch
scenarios.expectedResult: Document returned with baseUri and parsed by provided parser
pseudocode: TEST TC22 parse stream with parser and null charset
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(in, null, baseUri, xmlParser);

scenarios.description: parse(File, bad charsetName, baseUri) throws IOException for invalid charset
scenarios.expectedResult: IOException is thrown due to unsupported charset
pseudocode: TEST TC23 parse file with invalid charset

File f = create temp .html file with '

hi

'

scenarios.description: parse(Path, bad charsetName, baseUri) throws IOException for invalid charset
scenarios.expectedResult: IOException is thrown due to unsupported charset
pseudocode: TEST TC24 parse path with invalid charset

Path p = write '
ok
' to temp file

scenarios.description: parse(InputStream, bad charsetName, baseUri) throws IOException for invalid charset
scenarios.expectedResult: IOException is thrown due to unsupported charset
pseudocode: TEST TC25 parse stream with invalid charset

scenarios.description: parse(URL, timeoutMillis) propagates HttpStatusException when GET returns non-OK status
scenarios.precondition: HttpConnection.connect(url) is stubbed to return stub connection
pseudocode: TEST TC26 parse URL raises HttpStatusException
stub Connection conn where conn.timeout(1000) returns conn

scenarios.description: parse(URL, timeoutMillis) propagates UnsupportedMimeTypeException when GET returns unsupported mime
scenarios.precondition: HttpConnection.connect(url) is stubbed to return stub connection
pseudocode: TEST TC27 parse URL raises UnsupportedMimeTypeException
stub Connection conn where conn.timeout(2000) returns conn
